name: gemini-discord
description: Secure Discord bridge for your local Gemini CLI agent.

settings.name: Discord Bot Token
settings.description: Bot token from the Discord Developer Portal.

settings.name: Boss Discord User ID
settings.description: Stable numeric Discord user ID for full bridge authority.

settings.name: Owner Discord User IDs
settings.description: Discord user IDs allowed by legacy setup. Does not grant Boss authority.

settings.name: Discord Server ID
settings.description: ID of the server where the bot is installed.
